note: Mathlib/Analysis/Asymptotics/SpecificAsymptotics.lean:189 - proves only the Cesaro-mean corollary (b_n=n, arithmetic mean of a convergent sequence tends to the same limit), not the general Stolz-Cesaro ratio theorem for arbitrary strictly-monotone unbounded b_n; see also cesaro_smul at line 174.

Mathlib/Combinatorics/SimpleGraph/Coloring/EdgeLabeling.lean:37 - docstring explicitly disclaims equivalence: 'Sometimes this is called an edge-coloring, but we reserve that terminology for labelings where incident edges cannot share a label' - no proper-edge-coloring predicate (adjacent edges distinct) exists in Mathlib.
Mathlib/Data/Nat/Digits/Defs.lean:78 - generic base-b positional digit representation `digits : ℕ → ℕ → List ℕ`; ternary is the b=3 instance, no dedicated ternary-numeral-system decl exists.
